name: Hugging Face
description: Connect agents to Hugging Face Inference API with access to open-source models

fields.label: Access Token
fields.description: Hugging Face access token from huggingface.co/settings/tokens

defaultModel.description: Default model ID from Hugging Face Hub

provider.description: Inference provider (e.g. hf-inference, together, replicate, sambanova)

baseUrl.description: Custom inference endpoint URL (overrides default router)
